jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Simplilearn
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Simplilearn in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Simplilearn:
Simplilearn is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Simplilearn!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
